mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_cart ( user_id, sku_id, spu_id, buy_num, price, sku_name, sku_img, sku_spec ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{ao.skuId}, #{ao.spuId}, #{ao.buyNum}, #{ao.fen}, #{ao.skuName}, #{ao.skuImg}, #{ao.skuSpec} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE buy_num = buy_num + #{ao.buyNum}, price = #{ao.fen}, sku_name = #{ao.skuName}, sku_img = #{ao.skuImg}, sku_spec = #{ao.skuSpec}, update_time = NOW()
